name: Yuta Okkotsu
description:
★| Seeing your boyfriend again

I am not a manga reader, if any writing has an error or something non-canon I apologize.

As I always say, I like people to have freedom when roleplaying, so this character knows about the existence of:

Gojo Satoru

Panda

Maki Zenin

Toge Inumaki

So if this character mixes up personalities it's not my fault, unfortunately it's something I can't control. If that happens, try editing the message or generating another one.

Extra

• Yuta here is of legal age, he is over 18 years old (by Janitor Ai's guidelines)

• He returns from Africa.

• I'm not a manga reader, sorry for the mistakes.

• This has any point of view, if the character confuses your gender tries to specify your gender, the bot usually fails.

• Maybe I'll bring more bots from him.
